articles.title: The Retroid Pocket Nova Handheld Gaming Console Launches With PS2 and GameCube Emulation
articles.summary: Summary Retroid announced the Pocket Nova, a new handheld gaming console featuring a 4.5-inch AMOLED display with a 4:3 aspect ratioThe device is powered by a Qualcomm QCS8550 processor, which provides performance similar to the Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 to support PlayStation 2 and GameCube emulationStarting at $229 USD, the handheld includes a 5,000mAh battery with 27W fast charging, Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 5.3 connectivity Retroid announced the Pocket Nova, a dedicated gaming handheld that brings premium hardware to the competitive retro emulation market. The device targets enthusiasts seeking a high-performance 4:3 display format. This specific screen ratio naturally fits the native output of fifth and sixth-generation console libraries. articles.title: Nike Gives the Dunk Low Premium “Sesame” an Inflated, Bulbous Swoosh
articles.summary: Name: Nike Dunk Low Premium “Sesame”Colorway: Sesame/Pale Ivory/SesameSKU: IM4411-200MSRP: TBCRelease Date: Fall 2026Nike is pushing the iconic Dunk Low Premium silhouette into chunkier, more sculptural territory. Arriving in a “Sesame” colorway from upper to midsole, the entire sneaker is dressed in a matte leather build, matched by tonal overlays and clean stitching. Moving away from the brand's traditional flat color-blocking, this variant boasts a bulbous Swoosh. articles.title: Adidas, Uniqlo, Calvin Klein ads banned for greenwashing

articles.title: The Nike Air Rift 2 "Summit White/Swan" Brings the Split-Toe Slip-On Back for Summer 2026
articles.summary: Name: Nike Air Rift 2 “Summit White/Swan”Colorway:SKU: IQ8006-100MSRP: $125 USDRelease Date: June 25Where to Buy: NikeNike is bringing back the Air Rift 2 in a women's-exclusive "Summit White/Swan" colorway for Summer 2026, the latest release in the brand's sustained revival of the Air Rift line. The style marks another chapter in Nike's renewed focus on the split-toe silhouette, which has built significant momentum in recent seasons off the back of the original Air Rift's return.The Air Rift 2 first released in 2002 as a structural evolution of the original 1996 Air Rift, a shoe developed with input from barefoot runners training in Kenya's Rift Valley. Where the original Air Rift featured a Mary Jane-style single strap closure and a more pronounced midsole, the Air Rift 2 stripped things

articles.title: Ronnie Fieg and New Balance Debut the 2011, Kith's First Original Silhouette, to Mark 15 Years Together
articles.summary: Name: Kith New Balance 2011Colorway: Bark, Redwood, Leaf, SakuraSKU: TBCMSRP: TBCRelease Date: June 26 (In-store), June 29 (Global)Where to Buy: Kith, Kith AppRonnie Fieg and New Balance have debuted the 2011, the first original New Balance silhouette to come from their fifteen-year collaboration, releasing as the centerpiece of the Kith x New Balance 15th Anniversary collection. The silhouette's name directly references 2011, the year Kith was established, and its launch is timed to the opening of New Balance at Kith, a new collaborative retail space on the lower level of the Kith West Hollywood flagship.The 2011 has been two years in development. articles.title: Rier's Spring 2027 Collection Builds an Alpine Wardrobe From Natural Wool, Linen, Silk, and a Fourth Salomon Collaboration
articles.summary: Rier's Spring 2027 collection presents its most expansive material program to date, spanning 100% natural wool fleece, Austrian and Italian-sourced linen, 100% cotton fine-rib jersey, and multiple silk constructions, anchored by a fourth collaborative footwear chapter with Salomon and a returning jewellery partnership with Zoé Mohm. The collection is showing at the brand's Paris showroom from June 24 to June 30.Rier's signature 100% natural wool fleece returns in a reworked high-neck pullover with a less cropped, boxier volume, a vertical zipped chest pocket, an adjustable hem, and a single-shoulder construction designed for spring layering. articles.title: Nike's Air Force 1 Low "Patent Denim" Seals Coastal Blue Denim Beneath a Glossy Finish
articles.summary: Name: Nike Air Force 1 Low “Patent Denim”Colorway: Coastal Blue/Natural-Flax-Coastal BlueSKU: IM5757-400MSRP: TBCRelease Date: Summer 2026Nike is set to release the Air Force 1 Low "Patent Denim," applying a glossy patent finish over a Coastal Blue denim upper in a construction that keeps the fabric's weave and tonal variation visible beneath the gloss.The material logic here is the central point of interest. Rather than replacing denim with patent leather or treating them as separate design elements, the "Patent Denim" build layers the gloss directly over the fabric, allowing the denim's natural weave and the darker shading around the heel and side panels to show through. The result reads differently from a standard patent leather AF1 because the surface has tonal variation built into it,

articles.title: Nike's Total 90 "White/Black" Lets the Football Stitch Pattern Speak for Itself
articles.summary: Name: Nike Total 90 “White/Black”Colorway: TBCSKU: IO2388-100MSRP: TBCRelease Date: TBCNike is reportedly set to release the Total 90 "White/Black," bringing the pack's all-over hexagonal quilted leather upper to its most stripped-back colorway. The “White/Black” build retains the asymmetrical lacing and flat rubber sole of the lifestyle Total 90 series, while the clean two-tone finish gives the shoe's soccer ball-mimicking stitch pattern its clearest canvasThe construction concept driving the Soccer Ball pack is arguably easier to read on the model than on any other colorway in the lineup. articles.summary: Name: Nike Pegasus Premium “Cow Print”Colorway: Light Orewood Brown/Black-University Red-SailSKU: IR0033-100MSRP: $230 USDRelease Date: Fall 2026Nike's Pegasus Premium roster is set to welcome a new “Cow Print” variant this fall. The upper is grounded by a soft, natural "Light Orewood Brown" engineered mesh, which is sharply contrasted by a solid black tongue, laces and inner lining. Leaning fully into the western-inspired trend, Nike elevates the traditional branding by outfitting the lateral profile Swooshes in a "Sail"-colored pony hair material.The lower half of the sneaker is where the design truly makes its impact. The upper is dressed in a bold plaid textile featuring yellow, black and white tones, directly referencing Cher Horowitz’s signature look.A black leather Swoosh overlays the patterned base, while black laces, tongue, and lining provide sharp contrast. Metallic AF1 lace dubraes add a subtle touch of shine,while classic Nike Air branding appears on the tongue, insole and heel tab, reinforcing the shoe’s heritage identity. A classic meets modern amalgamation that has already produced iconic models such as the NMD_R1, Stan Smith, Forum Low, Ultraboost, and Superstar, alongside a slew of successful collaborations with cultural icons and influential brands like Pharrell Williams, Alexander Wang, Palace, Kendall Jenner and more. articles.title: Our Inside Look at the Ultimate Sneaker Archive and World Cup Boot Test Inside New Balance HQ
articles.summary: New Balance is no longer just the king of premium lifestyle runners but now also the absolute epicenter of global soccer and street culture. During an exclusive experience in Boston, the brand opened its doors to us for an immersive, behind-the-scenes look into the future of the beautiful game. Walking through the campus, the sheer scale of the brand’s athletic ambition becomes instantly clear. High-performance engineering and high-fashion aesthetics collide, seeing this world-class setup prove that the brand's current cultural foothold is meticulously calculated.The real magic happens where data meets design.
